evidence.text: Gross ton-miles and revenue ton-miles decreased slightly and 1%, respectively, in the second quarter of 2024 compared to 2023, while carloadings increased slightly in the second quarter of 2024 compared to 2023. For the year-to-date periods, gross ton-miles and revenue ton-miles decreased slightly and 2%, respectively, while carloadings were flat year-over-year.
evidence.subsection: OTHER OPERATING/PERFORMANCE AND FINANCIAL STATISTICS / Operating/Performance Statistics

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Demand is decelerating, indicating a moderate headwind.

factors.summary: The company is successfully raising prices.

evidence.text: Our operating ratio of 60.0% improved 3.0 points in the second quarter of 2024 compared to 2023 and our year-to-date operating ratio of 60.4% improved 2.2 points compared to 2023 mainly due to one-time items (the 2023 ratification agreement and the 2024 gain on the sale of intermodal equipment), core pricing gains, and productivity initiatives.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: The company is successfully raising prices, showing a clear positive trend.

evidence.text: Gross ton-miles and revenue ton-miles decreased slightly and 1%, respectively, in the second quarter of 2024 compared to 2023, while carloadings increased slightly in the second quarter of 2024 compared to 2023. For the year-to-date periods, gross ton-miles and revenue ton-miles decreased slightly and 2%, respectively, while carloadings were flat year-over-year.
evidence.subsection: OTHER OPERATING/PERFORMANCE AND FINANCIAL STATISTICS / Operating/Performance Statistics

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Organic revenue growth is decelerating, indicating a moderate decline.

evidence.text: Gross ton-miles and revenue ton-miles decreased slightly and 1%, respectively, in the second quarter of 2024 compared to 2023, while carloadings increased slightly in the second quarter of 2024 compared to 2023. For the year-to-date periods, gross ton-miles and revenue ton-miles decreased slightly and 2%, respectively, while carloadings were flat year-over-year.
evidence.subsection: OTHER OPERATING/PERFORMANCE AND FINANCIAL STATISTICS / Operating/Performance Statistics

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Unit volumes are declining, showing a clear negative trend.

factors.summary: Gross and operating margins are expanding.

evidence.text: Our operating ratio of 60.0% improved 3.0 points in the second quarter of 2024 compared to 2023 and our year-to-date operating ratio of 60.4% improved 2.2 points compared to 2023 mainly due to one-time items (the 2023 ratification agreement and the 2024 gain on the sale of intermodal equipment), core pricing gains, and productivity initiatives.

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Gross and operating margins are expanding significantly.

factors.summary: Cost reduction programs are delivering measurable savings.

evidence.text: Locomotive productivity increased 6% and 7% in the second quarter and six-month periods of 2024, respectively, compared to 2023 driven by improved network fluidity and asset utilization despite the impact of the weather events.
evidence.subsection: OTHER OPERATING/PERFORMANCE AND FINANCIAL STATISTICS / Operating/Performance Statistics

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Cost reduction programs are delivering measurable savings, indicating a positive development.

evidence.text: Locomotive productivity increased 6% and 7% in the second quarter and six-month periods of 2024, respectively, compared to 2023 driven by improved network fluidity and asset utilization despite the impact of the weather events.
evidence.subsection: OTHER OPERATING/PERFORMANCE AND FINANCIAL STATISTICS / Operating/Performance Statistics

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Operational efficiency is improving, showing a positive trend.

evidence.text: In 2024, we expect our capital plan to be approximately $3.4 billion, down 8% from 2023.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Capital expenditures are decreasing, indicating a positive financial move.

evidence.text: Adjusted debt / adjusted EBITDA improved to 2.8x from 3.0x compared to the prior year.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: The improvement in the debt/EBITDA ratio indicates better financial health.

factors.summary: Shareholder returns are maintained through buybacks and dividends.

evidence.text: Cash used in financing activities increased in the first six months of 2024 driven by a decrease in debt issued and an increase in debt repaid, partially offset by a decrease in share repurchases.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Decreased share repurchases may indicate reduced commitment to shareholder returns.

factors.summary: Free cash flow generation is improving.

evidence.text: Free cash flow for the six months ended June 30, 2024, was $853 million, compared to $596 million in the same period of 2023.
evidence.subsection: OTHER OPERATING/PERFORMANCE AND FINANCIAL STATISTICS / Operating/Performance Statistics

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Significant increase in free cash flow shows strong cash generation.

factors.summary: The company is in contraction mode with workforce reductions.

evidence.text: Total employees (average) decreased 5% and 3% in the second quarter and six-month periods of 2024 compared to 2023.
evidence.subsection: OTHER OPERATING/PERFORMANCE AND FINANCIAL STATISTICS / Operating/Performance Statistics

sentiment.label: very_negative
sentiment.rationale: Workforce reductions indicate contraction and potential challenges.

evidence.text: While the overall employee levels decreased in both periods compared to 2023, our active TE&Y employees increased to support increased crew needs associated with the new labor agreements.
evidence.subsection: OTHER OPERATING/PERFORMANCE AND FINANCIAL STATISTICS / Operating/Performance Statistics

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Mixed signals with increased employees but no clear sentiment on relations.

factors.summary: Near-term risks include weather impacts and economic conditions.

evidence.text: Weather events impacted our service performance in the second quarter of 2024. The year-to-date period was positively impacted by contract settlements in the first quarter of 2024.
evidence.subsection: OTHER OPERATING/PERFORMANCE AND FINANCIAL STATISTICS / Operating/Performance Statistics

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Mixed impact from weather and economic conditions.

factors.summary: Inflation and fuel prices are key sensitivities.

evidence.text: Our operating ratio improved mainly due to one-time items, core pricing gains, and productivity initiatives, partially offset by inflation, the year-over-year impact from lower fuel prices, as well as higher derailment, environmental remediation at a legacy site, and other costs.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Inflation and fuel prices are negatively impacting the operating ratio.

factors.summary: Management is confident, as indicated by share buybacks and capital expenditures.

evidence.text: Cash used in financing activities increased in the first six months of 2024 driven by a decrease in debt issued and an increase in debt repaid, partially offset by a decrease in share repurchases.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Decrease in share repurchases may reflect reduced confidence.
